examples: The people observe thy downcast head, thy clouded mien, and they take it for an omen.
Among these prisoners was an old lawyer--a man with a strong face and a dauntless mien.
It was impossible to tell from his mien whether he was offended.
His mien is that of the contemptuous guerrilla fighter, mixed with that of a truculent teenager.
Mary Woolnoth has a threatening mien, as though its fortresslike walls were needed to withstand dangerous pressures.
